name: Hydro Genex
name_jp: ハイドロ・ジェネクス
desc:
"Genex Controller" + 1 or more non-Tuner WATER monsters
When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard, gain Life Points equal to the ATK of the destroyed monster.
mnst_eff:
"Genex Controller" + 1 or more non-Tuner WATER monsters
When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard, gain Life Points equal to the ATK of the destroyed monster.
eff:
"Genex Controller" + 1 or more non-Tuner WATER monsters
When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard, gain Life Points equal to the ATK of the destroyed monster.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
summoning: Requires specific monsters as Tuner Synchro Materials
Requires Attribute specific non-Tuner Synchro Materials
